description: SAP provides enterprise software and cloud platform products for ERP, data, integration, analytics, and application development. Its web properties include product documentation, a developer hub, and tooling for SAP Business Technology Platform and related services.
summary: sap.com exposes documented developer surfaces including the SAP BTP CLI and SAP-hosted MCP server docs for ABAP Development Tools and Automation Pilot; SAP also operates the Business Accelerator Hub catalog at api.sap.com, but from the fetched pages I could not confirm concrete SAP-owned API/GraphQL endpoint URLs or authentication mechanics suitable to record as surfaces under sap.com.
